svg.title: Amazon Personalize Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end pipeline for Amazon Personalize: from raw data ingestion through dataset groups, schema, model training, and real-time recommendation API delivery.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What user data does Amazon Personalize use?')
sendPrompt('What item data does Amazon Personalize need?')
sendPrompt('What are interactions in Amazon Personalize?')
sendPrompt('What is a Dataset Group in Amazon Personalize?')
sendPrompt('What is a Schema in Amazon Personalize?')
sendPrompt('How does Amazon Personalize train its ML models?')
sendPrompt('What recipes are available in Amazon Personalize?')
sendPrompt('What is a Solution and Campaign in Amazon Personalize?')
sendPrompt('What is event tracking in Amazon Personalize?')
sendPrompt('How do I call the Amazon Personalize recommendation API?')
sendPrompt('How does the end user see Amazon Personalize results?')
